sql.query: SELECT w.id,w.templateId,w.templateVersionNumber,w.workflowName,w.referenceCode,w.status,w.currentStageId,w.ownerUserId,w.ownerTeamId,w.startDate,w.targetDate,w.completedDate,w.createdDate,w.modifiedDate,wt.templateName,t.teamName,u.displayName AS ownerName FROM tbl_workflows w LEFT JOIN tbl_workflow_templates wt ON wt.id=w.templateId LEFT JOIN tbl_teams t ON t.id=w.ownerTeamId AND t.tenantId=w.tenantId LEFT JOIN tbl_users u ON u.id=w.ownerUserId WHERE w.id=:id AND w.tenantId=:tenantId LIMIT 1
